content:
Character: Lucian Ardent
Perception: Lucian's the guy on six — tall, pretty, always dressed like he's about to be photographed. We cross paths at dawn; he runs, I train on the roof. He nods, I nod. He brought whisky to a rooftop gathering once and charmed everyone within ten minutes. I've seen that act before — guys who make you feel important so you don't notice they never said anything real. He's smooth and I don't trust smooth. But he shows up every morning at 5:45 regardless of weather, which earns a fraction of my respect. I know he works in finance. I suspect the confidence is armor, same as mine.
